ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dancers" (
  "dancer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dancer */,
  "dancer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the dancer */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the dancer attends */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the dancer registered for the competition */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the dancer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the dancer (e.g., Junior, Senior) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the dancer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the dancer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the dancer's profile picture */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the dancer has */,
  "preferred_dance_styles" TEXT /* Preferred dance styles of the dancer (e.g., Ballet, Hip-Hop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dancers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "school_website" TEXT /* URL to the school's website */,
  "school_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the school's logo */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the school principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the competition (e.g., Solo, Group) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the competition (e.g., Upcoming, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the competition */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors for the competition */,
  "prize_details" TEXT /* Details of the prizes for the competition */,
  "live_stream_url" TEXT /* URL to the live stream of the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition entry */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the entry is for */,
  "dancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dancer participating in the competition */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the entry was made */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the entry (e.g., Confirmed, Pending) */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the competition entry */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "dance_style" TEXT /* Style of dance for the entry (e.g., Ballet, Hip-Hop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_entries_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_entries_dancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dancer_id") REFERENCES dancers ("dancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition entry the score is for */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who gave the score */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the dancer */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the dancer in the competition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments from the judge */,
  "technical_score" REAL /* Technical score given by the judge */,
  "artistry_score" REAL /* Artistry score given by the judge */,
  "presentation_score" REAL /* Presentation score given by the judge */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score calculated from the individual scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES competition_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the judge */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., Ballet, Contemporary) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the judge */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the judge's profile picture */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a judge */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications the judge has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Judge, School Representative) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the user represents (if applicable) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout, View, Edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., Dancer, Competition, Score) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., New York, NY) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Competition Update, Score Update) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "dancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dancer the metric is for */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Technique, Artistry) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric (e.g., 8.5 out of 10) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., Judge, Automated System) */,
  "metric_weight" REAL /* Weight of the metric in the final score calculation */,
  "metric_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dancer_id") REFERENCES dancers ("dancer_id")
)
